scope: Full-Corpus (W40K Pässe 1..9 + HH Pässe 10..15, batches ssot-w40k-001..057 + ssot-hh-001..030)
purpose: Self-contained pre-merge snapshot of all reference-JSON rows and alias entries the Pass-2 merge plan touches. Captured BEFORE the first JSON edit (Schritt 4) so a full rollback can reset the JSON side without git archaeology. Pairs with consolidation-pass-2-db-snapshot.json (captured before Re-Apply) to cover both JSON and DB rollback.
rollbackProcedure: 1. Reset the rows below into their respective scripts/seed-data/*.json files (re-insert the removed mergee rows verbatim; revert keeper-row field-retention edits to the pre-merge values shown here).
2. Remove the newly added alias entries listed in 'aliasesAdded' from scripts/seed-data/*-aliases.json.
3. Apply the db-snapshot rollback (separate artifact) to restore DB-side state.
4. Re-run scripts/run-phase4-apply.sh scripts/consolidation-pass-2.config.json to reconcile junction state.

fieldRetentionAppliedInThisMerge.postMergeValue: Cross-era identity: HH-era Dark Angels chapter-master Merir Astelan (Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3, freq=1) debating compliance around Byzanthis in Call of the Lion (HH-0154, Astelan vs Belath compliance debate); cross-arc with the Fallen / Cypher / Lion arcs. Post-Heresy: First-of-the-Fallen renegade. primaryFactionId fallen_angels reflects the W40K-era canonical state (keeper-wins per consolidation-pass-2 field-retention; HH-era dark_angels affiliation captured here via cross-era note per ADR cross-era-identities). Consolidation-Pass 2 merge of merir_astelan (HH-era surface form) into astelan (W40K-canonical row).

preMergeRow.name: Merir Astelan
preMergeRow.notes: Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3 (7c curated freq=1 strong-lore-iconic Dark Angels cross-arc figure — First-of-the-Fallen post-Heresy renegade): Dark Angels chapter-master debating compliance around Byzanthis; Call of the Lion (HH-0154, Astelan vs Belath compliance debate). Cross-arc with the Fallen / Cypher / Lion arcs (his post-Heresy First-of-the-Fallen status is downstream from his Pass-13 surface). primaryFactionId dark_angels (Heresy-era).

preMergeRow.name: Nykona Sharrowkyn
preMergeRow.notes: Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3 (7c medium freq=1 Phase-3-promote per dossier recommendation — Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut, cross-arc with the Sisypheum arc + future Shattered-Legions novellas): Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut paired with Sabik Wayland; Kryptos (HH-0167, Graham McNeill — Sharrowkyn / Wayland + Sisypheum origin). primaryFactionId raven_guard.

fieldRetentionAppliedInThisMerge.postMergeValue: Resolver-Pass 13 Phase 3 (7c medium freq=1 Phase-3-promote per dossier recommendation — Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut, cross-arc with the Sisypheum arc + future Shattered-Legions novellas): Raven Guard Shadowmaster debut paired with Sabik Wayland; Kryptos (HH-0167, Graham McNeill — Sharrowkyn / Wayland + Sisypheum origin). Earlier Resolver-Pass 11 Phase 3 surface (7c curated freq=1 lore-iconic): Raven Guard sniper, Shattered Legions associate, Angel Exterminatus (HH-0023). primaryFactionId raven_guard. logicalFkTouches.$comment: Keine character→character oder character→faction logical-FK-touches: merir_astelan und sharrowkyn werden NICHT von anderen factions.parent_id oder characters.primary_faction_id Werten referenziert (logischer FK-Scope ist character→faction-Ziel, nicht character→character-Ziel).

$comment: Stand Phase 3 (alle Achsen adjudiziert, 2 Character-Merges: 1 cross-era lore-deep astelan↔merir_astelan + 1 same-era mechanical nykona_sharrowkyn↔sharrowkyn). Snapshot ist BEFORE-Schritt-4 (vor JSON-Edits) — die preMergeRow-Werte sind die Datei-Inhalte zur Phase-3-Start-Zeit; die postMergeValue-Felder in fieldRetentionAppliedInThisMerge dokumentieren das Ziel-Field-Set nach JSON-Edit. Rollback siehe rollbackProcedure.
